title: Heart Strings
writer: Henry Albert Phillips, E. Lloyd Sheldon
actors: William Farnum, Gladys Coburn, Betty Hilburn
plot: Pierre Fournel is a violinist living in a Canadian village with his sister, Gabrielle. Gabrielle is tricked into a mock marriage by Rouget, but she keeps the matter secret from her brother. Two New Yorkers, Kathleen Noyes and her ...
